positive: A stylized, minimalist representation of a cosmic fox spirit (kitsune), rendered in a bold, geometric linework style. The fox should be leaping across a nebula landscape, forming a dynamic, elegant silhouette against a deep indigo and emerald green background. Emphasize strong contrasts and clean lines, making the subject pop out. The style should be reminiscent of Japanese woodblock prints mixed with contemporary vector art. Perfect for a central apparel design, with clear separation between the main subject and the background elements. High contrast, vibrant color palette, flat graphic design aesthetic, symmetry and motion combined. Cinematic lighting only where it outlines the subject.
